---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and where does rustydocs fall short today? Concrete
use cases help a lot (e.g. "I run a Mintlify docs site and want section-level
staleness in CI" or "I want it to fail the build when critical content is stale").

## Proposed solution

What would you like rustydocs to do? If it's a new flag or config field, sketch
the name and behavior, e.g.:

```bash
rustydocs --content-dir ./docs --new-flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, workarounds you're using now, or related tools.

## Additional context

Anything else — example repos, expected report output, links.
